---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What's the situation where the current app falls short?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context

Mockups, references, or anything else that helps explain the request. Note that Owwed is intentionally local-first and does not move money or contact people — features should fit that scope.
